resources.string: Please check your connection and try again.
We couldn\’t load the assets. Please check your connection and try again.
We tried but couldn’t find anything.
Unable to launch Google Play Store app…
Wallet Birthday Height is the point in time when your wallet was created.
Entering your Wallet Birthday Height ensures we can display all your funds and transaction history correctly.
Zodl will scan and recover all transactions made after the following block number.

Zodl is a Zcash-powered mobile wallet, built for unstoppable private payments. It’s optimized for storage and real-world use of shielded $ZEC—the truly private cryptocurrency.\n\nDeveloped by the team that set the industry standard for onchain privacy, the original developers of the Zcash protocol.
Unable to find a web browser app.
Get 5%% off airgapped hardware wallet. Promo code "Zodl".
You will be asked to confirm on the next screen
Confirm to disconnect your hardware wallet
Disconnecting your hardware wallet will permanently delete some local data that can\'t be recovered from the blockchain.
Transactions later reversed in a chain reorg
If you disconnect now, your Keystone will no longer be paired with your Zodl wallet.
Disconnecting the hardware wallet cannot be undone.
Disconnecting the hardware wallet couldn\'t be finalized. Please try again or report an issue.
Use biometric or device credential to access %1$s.
Authentication failed for the following reason. Retry the authentication, or contact the support team for help.
Authentication was presented but not recognized. Retry authentication, or contact the support team for help.
Tap the key icon to unlock it.
Error: The attempt to switch endpoints failed. Check that the hostname and port are correct, and are formatted as <hostname>:<port>.
The selected server endpoint has been successfully saved.
We may use multiple servers to optimize performance. To reduce metadata exposure, choose Manual connection mode to select your single server of choice, and ensure Tor is enabled in Advanced Settings.
Scan your device’s QR code to connect.
Select Zodl app and scan QR code
Connecting to a hardware wallet that was previously connected to Zodl will require synchronization to discover your transaction history. We\'ll guide you through it.
Your Keystone Hardware Wallet has been successfully connected.
Entering the block height at which your wallet was created ensures that correct number of blocks will be scanned. If you\’re not sure, choose an earlier date.
If you\’re not sure, choose an earlier date.
A hardware wallet (HW wallet) is a physical device that stores your cryptocurrency private keys offline, keeping them safe from online hackers and malware.
Your keys never leave the device, even when signing transactions
Immune to computer viruses and phishing attacks
You own your keys, you own your crypto
Keystone is a popular hardware wallet brand that offers air-gapped security with QR code signing. It\'s one of many trusted hardware wallet options, alongside Ledger and others.

is the block height (block # in the blockchain) at which your wallet was created. It is important to provide the correct height because that determines the range of blocks we will scan to display your transaction history and wallet balance. If you have recovered a seed from a different hardware device, make sure to enter the block height of your original hardware device.
This contact name is already in use. Please choose a different name.
This contact name exceeds the 32-character limit. Please shorten the name.
This wallet address is already in your Address Book.
An address with this chain already exists in your Address Book.
Crash reports are an essential tool for developers to improve the quality and reliability of apps. They are very useful in practice to help with fixing bugs that cause crashes.

Note: The crash reports include information about app version, time when the crash happened, and stack trace so it\’s clear where in the app the crash happened. The data collected is completely anonymized.
Share crash reports with Zodl developers.
Don’t share crash reports with Zodl developers.
Make sure you have both your secret recovery phrase and wallet birthday height saved before you proceed.
Resetting the Zodl app will delete the Zodl database and cache, and will disconnect all connected hardware wallets.
Once you Reset Zodl, the only way to access your funds is through a wallet restore process that requires your Zodl Recovery Phrase and Wallet Birthday Height.
Keep encrypted metadata backup - which includes contacts, notes, bookmarks, and swap/payment details.
This data cannot be recovered during Restore.
Resetting the app cannot be undone. You will need to restore your wallet using your secret recovery phrase.
Wallet deletion failed. Try it again, please.
Unknown cause. Please contact our support team if the problem persists .\n\n%s
An error happened during the last shielding transaction. You can try again later or report this issue if the problem persists.\n\n%s
An error happened during the last shielding transaction. We will try to resubmit the transaction later. If it fails, you may need to repeat the shielding attempt at a later time.
Tor connection issues detected. To improve performance, try disabling Tor. This will stop exchange rate updates. You can re-enable it later in Advanced Settings.
Zodl\'s currency conversion feature doesn\'t compromise your IP address.
Exchange rates are fetched over Tor to protect your IP address. Ensure Tor use is allowed in your region.
The rate is refreshed automatically and can also be refreshed manually.
We tried but we couldn\’t refresh the exchange rate for you. Check your connection, relaunch the app, and we\’ll try again.
Live rates for %1$s can\'t be fetched right now. You can use USD as a fallback, or keep entering amounts in ZEC only.
Note for the super privacy-conscious: Because we pull the conversion rate from exchanges, an exchange might be able to see that the exchange rate was queried before a transaction occurred.
Display your balance and payment amounts in selected currency. For Swap and Pay, exchange rates will continue to be shown in USD. You can manage this feature in Advanced Settings.
Display your balance and payment amounts in your selected currency. For Swap and Pay, exchange rates will continue to be shown in USD.

Tor Protection is a beta feature that provides additional protections for your IP address. USD exchange rates are only available when it is enabled.\n\nIf Tor is permitted in your region, we recommend enabling it. You can manage it in Advanced Settings.
Disabling Tor Protection will also disable the Currency Conversion feature until re-enabled.
If you would like to protect your IP address, enable Tor Protection in Advanced Settings.

By clicking “I Agree” below, you give your consent to export all of your wallets’ private data such as the entire history of your wallet(s), including any connected hardware wallets. All private information, memos, amounts, and recipient addresses, even for your shielded activity will be exported.*

The private data also gives the ability to see certain future actions you take with Zodl.

Sharing this private data is irrevocable - once you have shared this private data with someone, there is no way to revoke their access.

*Note that this private data does not give them the ability to spend your funds, only the ability to see what you do with your funds.
I agree to Zodl\'s Export Private Data Policies and Privacy Policy
Unable to find an application to share with.
I would like to ask about…
Zodl is about to open your e-mail app with a pre-filled message.\n\nBe sure to hit send within your e-mail app.
Please let us know about any problems you have had, or features you want to see in the future.
Check your connection and reload Zodl
Waiting for last transaction to process
Keep Zodl open on active phone screen
Your funds are ready to be used now
Keep Zodl open on an active phone screen
Prevent potential loss of funds by securely backing up your wallet.
Back up access to your funds by backing up:
Secret Recovery Phrase (a unique set of 24 words in a precise order)
Wallet Birthday Height (block height at which your wallet was created)
In case you lose access to the app or to your device, knowing the Secret Recovery Phrase is the only way to recover your funds. We cannot see it and cannot help you recover it.
Anyone with access to your Secret Recovery Phrase will have full control of your wallet, so keep it secure and never show it to anyone.
I read and understand the risks of not backing up my wallet.
Do not show this message again.
To protect user privacy, Zodl doesn\'t support spending transparent %s. Tap the \"Shield\" button below to make your transparent funds spendable and your total Zodl balance private.
This will create a shielding in-wallet transaction, consolidating your transparent and shielded funds. (Typical fee: < %1$s %2$s)
You appear to be offline. Please restore your internet connection to use Zodl wallet.
Zodl is scanning the blockchain to retrieve your transactions. Older wallets can take hours to restore. Follow these steps to prevent interruption:
Keep the Zodl app open on an active phone screen.
To prevent your phone screen from going dark, turn off power-saving mode and keep your phone plugged in.
Funds cannot be spent until your wallet is restored.
Zodl is scanning the blockchain for your latest transactions to make sure your balances are displayed correctly. Keep the Zodl app open on an active phone screen to avoid interruptions.
Zodl is scanning the blockchain for your latest transactions to make sure your balances are displayed correctly. Keep the Zodl app open on an active phone screen to avoid interruptions.
Your last transaction is getting mined and confirmed.
Crash reports are an essential developer tool used to improve the quality and reliability of apps. Their sole purpose is to fix bugs that cause crashes.
We use Firebase Crashlytics to collect crash reports. They include information about app version, time when the crash happened, and stack trace so it’s clear where in the app the crash happened.
Zodl does not and cannot access or collect information about individual users, their devices, transactions, or their in-app activity. The data is completely anonymized.
All your funds are shielded and spendable.
Pending receipt of change from a prior transaction.
Zodl is scanning the blockchain to make sure your balances are displayed correctly.
Shield your transparent %1$s to make it spendable and private. Doing so will create a shielding in-wallet transaction, consolidating your transparent and shielded funds. (Typical fee: %2$s %3$s)

We couldn\'t create this transaction for you. Your wallet doesn\'t have enough balance to cover both the transaction amount and transaction fees. Please lower the transaction amount to account for the fees.
A hassle-free way to buy %1$s and get it directly into your Zodl wallet.
Zodl integrations provide access to third party services. Features and information shared with them are outside of our control and subject to their privacy policies.
Information shared with Zodl integrations is subject to their privacy policies.
During the Restore process, it is not possible to use payment integrations.
Spend ZEC at thousands of retail locations.
Authenticate yourself to pay with Flexa
Connect airgapped hardware wallet to store shielded ZEC.
Switch from Keystone to Zodl to use Flexa.
Zodl is scanning the blockchain to retrieve your transactions. Older wallets can take hours to sync. Follow these steps to prevent interruption:
Keep the Zodl app open on an active phone screen.
To prevent your phone screen from going dark, turn off power-saving mode and keep your phone plugged in.
Zodl is scanning the blockchain to retrieve your transactions. Older wallets can take hours to complete syncing. Follow these steps to prevent interruption:
Your Zodl funds cannot be spent until your Keystone wallet is synced.
Zodl is scanning the blockchain to retrieve your transactions. Older wallets can take hours to resync. Follow these steps to prevent interruption:
Your funds cannot be spent until your wallet is resynced.
Your funds cannot be spent until your wallet is restored.
Zcash-powered mobile wallet built for financial sovereignty.

Make cross-chain payments in any NEAR-supported coin or token.\n\nIf the actual slippage and network conditions result in your recipient receiving less than the promised amount, your transaction will be reversed. You will receive a full refund minus network fees.
Any unused portion of the slippage fee will be refunded if the swap executes with lower slippage than expected.
An error occurred and the attempt to send funds failed. Try it again, please.
Zodl encountered some connection issues when submitting the transaction to the network. It will retry during the next few minutes.
Unable to find an application for sharing the QR code.
Hi, scan this QR code to send me a %s payment! Download Link: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=co.electriccoin.zcash
For privacy, always use shielded address.
Rotates every time you use it
Use this address to receive and store your %s privately. Transparent and shielded %s sent to this address will be received and stored as shielded %s.
A new Zcash Shielded Address is generated each time you open the Receive screen.
All transactions sent to your different rotating Shielded Addresses will remain part of one wallet balance under the same seed phrase.
While we recommend using a new address every time, each unique address can be reused.
This addresses type works just like Bitcoin addresses and offers NO PRIVACY. The details of transactions sent to this address will be public and visible on the blockchain.
We don\'t recommend using this address type unless the wallet or exchange from which %s is being sent doesn’t support sending funds to shielded Zcash addresses.
To protect your privacy, Zodl will guide you to shield any transparent %s you receive with just one click.
You won\'t be able to spend your transparent %s until you shield it.
Unable to find an application for sharing the QR code.
Hi, scan this QR code to send me a %s payment! Download Link: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=co.electriccoin.zcash
Please type in your 24-word secret recovery phrase in the correct order.

is a unique set of 24 words, appearing in a precise order. It can be used to gain full control of your funds from any device via any Zcash wallet app. Think of it as the master key to your wallet. It is stored in Zodl’s Advanced Settings.

is the block height (block # in the blockchain) at which your wallet was created. If you ever lose access to your Zodl app and need to recover your funds, providing the block height along with your recovery phrase can significantly speed up the process.
Decide how far Zodl should scan. Enter a date before your first received transaction. If you\’re not sure, choose an earlier date.
This word is not in the seed phrase dictionary. Please select the correct one from the suggestions.
If Tor is available in your region, we recommend enabling it for enhanced privacy during wallet restoration. This step is completely optional.
Routes your connection through the Tor network for enhanced anonymity and privacy protection.
Decide how far Zodl should resync. Enter a date before your first received transaction. If you\'re not sure, choose an earlier date.
Your wallet will be resynced from %1$s (%2$s blocks). Zodl will scan and recover all transactions made after the following block number.

Resync the current wallet without resetting the app. This can be used to troubleshoot issues that would normally require restoring your wallet like fixing your Keystone balance.\n\nUnless you specify otherwise below, Zodl will resync from the date displayed.
Unless you specify otherwise below, Zodl will resync from the date displayed.
Your wallet will be resynced from %1$s (%2$s blocks). Use the button below if you wish to change it.
Resync of the wallet couldn’t be finalized. Please try again or report an issue.
The camera is not authorized. Please go to the system settings of Zodl and turn in on.
Camera initialization failed. Try it again, please.
This QR code doesn`t contain a valid Zcash address.
This image doesn`t contain a valid Zcash address.
This image contains several valid Zcash addresses.
Looks like you used a third-party app to scan for payment.
For better safety and security, rescan the QR code with Zodl.
This QR code is not a valid Keystone wallet.
The camera is not authorized. Please go to the system settings of Zodl and turn in on.
Camera initialization failed. Try it again, please.
This QR code is not a valid Zcash Address.
Scan your Keystone wallet to connect
Scan Keystone QR code to sign the transaction
These words are the only way to recover your funds! Make sure to save them in the correct order.
Wallet Birthday Height determines the birth (chain) height of your wallet and facilitates faster wallet restore process. Save this number together with your seed phrase in a safe place.
Your secret recovery phrase is a unique set of 24 words, appearing in a precise order. It protects access to your funds.
Keep this phrase securely hidden. Don’t take screenshots of it or store it on your phone!
Use it to access your funds from other devices and Zcash wallets.
Don\'t share it with anyone! It can be used to gain full control of your funds.
We don’t have access to it and will never ask for it. If you lose it, it cannot be recovered.
The block height at which your wallet was created can significantly speed up the wallet recovery process.
Select the wallet you\'d like to connect to proceed. Once connected, you’ll be able to wirelessly sign transactions with your hardware wallet.
Error: The attempt to send funds failed. Try it again, please.
Add contact by tapping on Address Book icon.
Your coins are being sent to\n %1$s
Your coins have been successfully shielded
There was an error attempting to shield your coins. Try it again, please.
Your coins were successfully sent to\n %1$s
There was an error attempting to send coins.\nTry it again, please.
Zodl encountered connection issues when submitting the transaction. It will retry in the next few minutes.

Send to this recipient required multiple transactions but only some of them succeeded and the rest failed. Your funds are safe but need to be recovered with assistance from our side.\n\nPlease use the button below to contact us. it automatically prepares all the data we need in order to help you restore your funds.

Hi, Zodl Team.

While sending a transaction to a TEX address, I encountered an error state. I'm reaching out to get guidance on how to recover my funds.

Thank you.
You successfully initiated a swap.\nFollow its status on the transaction screen.
There was an error initiating a swap.\nTry it again, please.
Your coins are being sent to the deposit address…
Timed out waiting for a server response. Your transaction may still have been broadcast.
Your swap is being processed. Follow its status on the transaction screen.
Your cross-chain payment is being processed. Follow its status on the transaction screen.
Your shielding transaction is being processed.
You successfully initiated a cross-chain payment.\nFollow its status on the transaction screen.
After you have signed with Keystone, tap on the Get Signature button below.
Rejecting the signature will cancel the transaction, and you’ll need to start over if you want to proceed. This action cannot be undone.
After you have signed with Keystone, tap on the Scan Signature button below.
Unable to skip remaining Keystone bundles.
No selected Keystone account is available.
Failed to prepare the Keystone signing request.
That Keystone signature was already scanned for bundle %1$d of %2$d. Sign the current bundle on Keystone, then scan the new QR.
That signature is for a different bundle. Sign bundle %1$d of %2$d on Keystone, then scan the new QR.
You will submit with %1$s signed and give up %2$s from the unsigned bundles.

Swap %1$s with any NEAR-supported token.

If swapping TO %2$s, you will send funds from a 3rd party wallet and provide an address where change can be refunded.

If swapping FROM %3$s, you must provide a valid address for the asset you are swapping to.
This setting determines the maximum allowable difference between the expected price of a swap and the actual price you pay, which is outside of Zodl\'s control.
You may receive up to %s less than quoted.
Slippage %1$s increases the chance your swap will be unsuccessful and refunded. Consider using %2$s, especially for larger amounts.
You may pay up to %s more, in addition to transaction fees.
If you leave this screen, all the information you entered will be lost.
Amount is too low for bridge, try at least %s
Amount is too low for bridge, try higher amount.
We tried but couldn\’t get a quote for a payment with your parameters. You can try to adjust the slippage or try again later.
We tried but couldn\’t get a quote for a swap with your parameters. You can try to adjust the slippage or try again later.
You could receive up to %s less based on the %s slippage you set.
Use your %s wallet \n to deposit funds. Depositing other assets may result in loss of funds.
Deposit address for %1$s %2$s on %3$s swap to %4$s in Zodl

If the swap fails or market conditions change, your transaction may be refunded minus the transaction fees.\n\nThe refunded amount will be returned to your wallet in the source currency. Please enter a valid address to avoid loss of funds.

If the swap fails or market conditions change, your transaction may be refunded minus the transaction fees.\n\nThe refunded amount will be returned to your wallet in the source currency - %s on %s. Please enter a valid address to avoid loss of funds.
Are you sure you want to exit?
If you\'ve sent or intend to send the funds, tap \'I\'ve sent the funds.\' Or cancel the swap to return to the previous screen.
Swap into ZEC with any NEAR-supported asset.
Send the exact amount of the asset displayed. Sending less will result in a refund.
Double-check that you are sending the correct asset on the correct network (e.g., USDC on Solana).
It’s best to send from a wallet you own. Sending from an exchange may result in delays or refunds.
Download your %s transaction history from the previous calendar year in a .csv format.
Keystone doesn\'t currently support transfers to Binance TEX addresses.
Please use the steps below to complete your transaction.
Transfer ZEC to your Zodl shielded address
Send from Zodl to TEX address
Once received in Zodl, send the tokens to your final TEX destination address

Tor provides additional protections for your IP address. This feature uses Tor network to fetch exchange rates, send transactions, retrieve transaction data, and connect to third party APIs.\n\nIf Tor is permitted in your region, we recommend enabling it.
Fetch exchange rates from third-party servers without revealing your IP address. (Only available with Tor enabled.)
Send and retrieve transaction data over Tor for added privacy.
Access third-party APIs (e.g. NEAR) over Tor for added privacy.
Your deposit was detected but the swap could not be completed. Your funds have been returned, minus transaction fees. If you haven\'t received them, contact the Zodl support team.
Your swap has been delayed. Swaps typically complete in minutes but may take longer depending on market conditions.
This swap could not be completed. If you deposited funds and didn\'t receive your swap, contact support so we can help resolve it.
This swap expired after its 24-hour validity window. If you didn\'t send funds, no action is needed. If you did send funds, contact support so we can help.

Tapping the button below will send details about this swap (like the deposit address and target asset) to the Zodl support team so they can help resolve your issue. The transaction info is included automatically.

Please describe your issue here:



Swap Details:
Deposit Address: %1$s
Source Asset: %2$s
Target Asset: %3$s
Deposits may take several minutes to confirm.
Deposit an additional %1$s to complete this swap before %2$s, or your deposit will be refunded.
There is a required update\nfor Zodl that makes major improvements to\nperformance and/or security.
There is a new version of Zodl that makes minor updates to improve performance and/or security.\n\nPlease take a moment to update to the latest version.
Learn more about this update here.
You are about to delete this contact. This cannot be undone.
Pick a poll source, or add your own.
Add a poll source that isn\'t listed by default. You\'ll need a valid chain URL from the provider hosting the poll.
Update the title or URL for this custom poll source. You\'ll need a valid chain URL from the provider hosting the poll.
Enter a title for this source.
Title must be 15 characters or less, including spaces.
Enter a static config HTTPS URL.
Please enter a valid URL (e.g. https://zodl.com/polls)
That URL is the default source. Select Default instead.
This source URL is already added.
Unable to validate this source. Check the URL and checksum, then try again.
Your ZEC gives you a voice. Shape the future of the Zcash network by voting on active proposals.
Vote on each question by selecting an answer. You can skip questions and update your choices anytime before submitting.
When you\'re ready, you\'ll confirm a small authorization transaction and submit your vote in one step. After submission, your vote cannot be changed.
Your balance at the snapshot time determines your voting weight. You don\'t need to move your funds anywhere.
There aren\'t any active polls at the moment. Check back later.
Could not fetch voting rounds. Please try again.
Could not load poll details. Please try again.
Could not load proposal. Please try again.
Could not load voting proposals. Please try again.
Could not load voting results. Please try again.
Could not fetch voting round data. Please try again.
We couldn\'t connect to the voting service. Please try again later, or contact support if the issue persists.
You don\'t have enough ZEC to cover the transaction fee. Add funds to your wallet and try again.
We couldn\'t authorize your vote. Check your connection and try again.
The voting period has ended. Your vote can no longer be submitted.
This poll hasn\'t been verified. We can\'t confirm its legitimacy or how results will be used.
Review before signing the voting authorization with your Keystone. This is final. Your vote will be published and cannot be changed.
Review before confirming the voting authorization. This is final. Your vote will be published and cannot be changed.
Vote submission is in progress, please don\'t leave this screen until it is finished.
Your vote was successfully published and cannot be changed.
Your vote couldn\'t be submitted. Check your connection and try again.
Authorization transaction failed. Please try again.
No vote choices are available to submit.
Resume the pending Keystone signing request, then continue signing the remaining delegation bundles.
Sign each prepared delegation bundle with Keystone before submitting your votes.
I am authorizing this hotkey managed by my wallet to vote on %1$s with %2$s.
Your wallet is still preparing the voting authorization for this poll.
Your wallet has no shielded notes from before the snapshot block. Only funds that existed at block #%@ are eligible for this voting round.
Your wallet has no shielded notes from before snapshot block #%1$s. Only funds that existed at the snapshot block are eligible for this voting round.
Your shielded voting weight at the snapshot block was %1$s ZEC, so this wallet is not eligible for this voting round.
Your shielded voting weight at snapshot block #%1$s was %2$s ZEC, so this wallet is not eligible for this voting round.
You have not responded to 1 question. Confirm to skip this question or go back to respond.
You have not responded to %1$d questions. Confirm to skip these questions or go back to respond.
Select at least one answer before reviewing and submitting your vote.
Tap on the question to edit any of your answers. After you review your answers, tap on Confirm & Submit.
Results are being tallied. The election authority is decrypting the aggregate vote totals.
Unable to reach any vote server. Please check your internet connection and try again.
This wallet has already been registered for this voting round. If you have this wallet on multiple devices, please use the device where you originally started the voting process.
This voting round is no longer accepting votes. It may have ended or is not yet open.
This voting round could not be found on the network.
The nullifier service is out of sync with the round\'s snapshot. Voting cannot proceed until a PIR server reports the matching snapshot. Please try again in a few minutes.
The nullifier service returned invalid proof data. Please try again in a few minutes.
Unable to reach the nullifier service. Please check your internet connection and try again.
The voting configuration is missing nullifier-service endpoints. Please update the app and try again.
Your transaction hasn\'t been confirmed yet. The network may be congested — please wait a moment and try again.
The voting state is out of sync. Please retry to use the latest data.
Your proof was rejected by the network. Please try again.
Proof generation failed. Please try again.
The voting commitment tree is not available yet. The voting round may not have started or the chain has not processed any commitments.
The voting server is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
Unable to reach the Zcash lightwalletd server. Please check your internet connection or try switching to a different server in Settings.
Could not connect to the privacy-preserving vote server. Please check your connection and try again.
Insufficient funds to authorize your vote. A small fee is required.
Your shielded balance at the snapshot (%1$s ZEC) is below the minimum required to vote (%2$s ZEC).
Your wallet is not fully synced. Please wait for syncing to complete before voting.
Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
Your app may need an update to participate in this voting round.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
Your wallet needs to sync to the snapshot block height before you can participate in voting.
Your wallet needs to scan up to block %1$d before you can vote. Currently at block %2$d.
Zodl requires %1$d GB of space to synchronize the Zcash blockchain but there is only
. Syncing will stay paused until more space is available.\n\n~%1$d MB of additional space required to continue
